name: sheepdog
description: Boundary-guard mode for AI agents. Blocks misplaced responsibility, god-orchestrator growth, layer shortcuts, and side-effect leaks.

interface.longDescription: Blocks misplaced responsibility, layer shortcuts, god-orchestrator growth, and side-effect leaks before AI-generated code drifts across module boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use Sheepdog mode for this task.
